title: Morning Song
lines: Good morning, good morning, rise and shine!
Brush your teeth and feel so fine!
Pack your bag, it is time for school!
Learn and play and follow the rules!

title: Numbers Song
lines: One, two, three, come sing with me!
Four, five, six, clap joyfully!
Seven, eight, nine, we will do just fine!
Ten we cheer, a perfect line!

title: Colors of the Rainbow
lines: Red and orange, yellow too,
Green and blue, I love the view!
Purple shines up in the sky,
Rainbow colors way up high!
Can you name them one by one?
Saying colors is so fun!

title: The Animal Parade
lines: The cat goes meow, the dog goes woof,
The cow goes moo from under the roof!
The duck says quack by the little lake,
The snake goes hiss, the frog says croak!
The lion roars loud and the birds all sing,
What a wonderful sound that the animals bring!

title: Days of the Week
lines: Monday, Tuesday, here we go,
Wednesday, Thursday, watch me grow!
Friday comes and then hooray,
Saturday is my favorite play day!
Sunday's here for rest and fun,
Seven days and the week is done!

title: My Body Parts
lines: Head, shoulders, knees, and toes,
Eyes and ears and mouth and nose!
I can clap my hands up high,
I can wave and say goodbye!
Wiggle fingers, stomp your feet,
Move your body to the beat!

title: The Weather Song
lines: Is it sunny, is it hot?
Grab your hat and find a spot!
Is it rainy, grab your coat,
Puddles here and there to float!
Is it snowy, cold and white?
Build a snowman, hold on tight!

title: Polite Words Song
lines: Please and thank you, that is nice,
Kind words are like a bowl of rice!
Excuse me when you need to pass,
I am sorry makes things last.
You are welcome, have a seat,
Polite words make life so sweet!
